title: S.O.4290(E) 05.09.2018- Corrigendum of Reconstitution of Tamil Nadu Coastal Zone Management Authority

No. 11, the status of the corresponding Expert Member shall be now read as ‘Member’ in lieu of ‘Member Secretary’. [F.No.J—l701l/18/l996—IA.III(pt.)] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy.
